description_long: This is a weathered stone obelisk standing on a circular, tiered base, set on a patch of grass. The shaft of the obelisk is adorned with several protruding, rounded stone nubs arranged vertically, giving it a distinctive, rugged appearance. Near the base, there is an engraved band with partially legible text, suggesting commemorative or historical significance. The stone surface is rough and mottled, with visible signs of aging and discoloration. The tip of the obelisk is irregular and appears to be slightly broken or unfinished, lacking a sharp point. The surrounding area is grassy, with no additional structures or objects immediately adjacent to the monument.
description: A weathered stone obelisk with protruding nubs and an engraved circular base, set on grass. The surface is rough and aged, with a partially broken tip.
description_view_0: Front view showing the engraved band near the base and several rounded nubs on the shaft.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the circular base and the vertical alignment of the stone nubs.
description_view_2: Rear view with a clearer look at the rough, irregular tip and the back of the base.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the shadowed side of the base and the weathered texture of the stone.
attribute_inscription: There is an engraved band near the base with partially legible text, possibly in English, in a serif style. The inscription is weathered and difficult to fully read.
attribute_ornamentation: The shaft features several rounded, protruding stone nubs arranged vertically, serving as decorative elements.
attribute_base_design: The base is circular and tiered, with a rough stone texture and an engraved band. It appears solid and slightly wider than the shaft, providing stability.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is irregular, appearing broken or unfinished, with no sharp point or additional decoration.
attribute_surrounding_features: The obelisk is surrounded by grass with no other notable features or objects immediately adjacent.
